title: Secret Door
snippet:
She swam out of tonight’s phantasm
Grabbed my hand and made it very clear
There’s absolutely nothing for us here

title: Crimenes Perfectos
snippet:
No me lastimes con tus crímenes perfectos
Mientras la gente indiferente se da cuenta

title: 40 Days
snippet:
Forty days and I miss you
I’m so high that I’ve lost my mind
It’s the summer I’m thinking of

title: Holding Out For You
snippet:
He frankly conceded
I am not the way that you had hoped and prayed
I’m sorry if I’ve caused you any pain

title: Pictures of Me
snippet: Everybody’s dying just to get the disease

title: Soma
snippet:
Soma is what they would take when
Hard times opened their eyes
Saw pain in a new way

title: Last Night I Dreamt That Somebody Loved Me
snippet:
No hope, no harm
Just another false alarm

title: A Rush of Blood to the Head
snippet:
He said, “I’m gonna buy this place and burn it down
I’m gonna put it six feet underground

title: Uncle Ace
snippet: Losing my sense of where

title: Happiness/The Gondola Man
snippet: I’m never gonna know you now, but I’m gonna love you anyhow

title: Frou-Frou Foxes in Midsummer Fires
snippet:
In a sunlit room where the walls are thin
I can hear you breathing

title: Sleep Walk
snippet:
I can’t see what you see
But I feel what you feel

title: Souvlaki Space Station
snippet:
Come back to me
Through the rain and the dark

title: Venice Bitch
snippet:
Fresh out the hospital
Missed your love and the way you make me feel

title: Baby Britain
snippet:
Baby Britain feels the best
Floating over a sea of vodka
Separated from the rest

title: Hobo's Lament
snippet:
I’ve been riding these rails so long
I forgot what it feels like to stop

title: Honey Water
snippet: I carry you around in the back of my mind

title: Bosphore
snippet:
On traverse le Bosphore
Encore une fois encore

title: Starlight
snippet:
I want to stay here, in the starlight
Forever with you

title: West Coast
snippet:
I was always an unusual girl
My mother told me I had a chameleon soul
